TITLE: Pre-filled Custom Party Bags with Handmade Squishy
DESCRIPTION:
Take the stress out of party planning with custom pre-filled party bags, packed with goodies and custom squishies!

Perfect for birthday parties, school celebrations, playdates, and special events, these party bags are ready to hand out, no extra shopping or filling required!

Bags start at $8.95 each and vary depending on bags, squishies, other items to fill and customisation. 

Working with you to:
- Custom themes
- Work with your budget
- Order/shop for all the items you want or give me all the goodies you want and I'll put it altogether
- Create custom stickers and labels
- I will pack all the party bags
- Delivery/meet up in Melbourne depending on location
- Postage AUS wide at buyers cost

What can be added:
- Custom Squishies to match your theme!
- Bubbles
- Glow sticks
- Stickers & Temporary Tattoos 
- Stamps
- Mini interactive toys (slinkies, pinball game etc)
- Plush toys
- Pencils and colouring pages (I can design and print to match your theme)
- Chocolate, lollies & baby nibbles such as mum-mums

The list can go on forever, I am here to make your vision come to life!

Order Requirements:
Message me with the following details below to start:
- Date of party
- Number of party bags
- Budget
- What your vision is for the special event

As these are made to order, we will need a minimum of 2 weeks notice.
